conbody.p: This section provides information about issues that were resolved in release 25.2.

section.title: Resolved Issues in Juniper Cloud-Native Router Release 25.2

ul.li: JCNR-11320: Modifying Layer 2 Circuit Protect Interface results in a cRPD crash—When configuring Layer 2 circuit configuration,modifying the protect interface to another primary interface, no longer causes in a cRPD crash.

JCNR-11257: Traffic drop upon cRPD restart if JCNR is handling over 2 million flows through MPLSoUDP tunnels—When handling over two million traffic flows through MPLSoUDP tunnels, traffic drop is no longer observed in JCNR if cRPD is restarted.
